English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Maurice C. Burritt Director of Extension papers
Burritt, M. C. (Maurice Chase)
21-24-101
3.2 cubic feet. 3.2 cubic feet.
1919-1924. Correspondence and other records. Correspondence and other records of the Director of Extension at the New York State College of Agriculture. Collection material in English 2267908
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M.E. Warren
Date completed:
March 1994
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, March 2003
Revised:
Margaret Nichols, August 2015
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence and other records of the Director of Extension at the New York State College of Agriculture. Topics include services for farmers, fruit and vegetable growers, and homemakers; other New York State agricultural organizations; New York State counties; and reports on the current state of the New York State College of Agriculture and its extension program. Included is a photograph album illustrating the overcrowded conditions in the New York State College of Agriculture as of 1920.
Cite As:
Maurice C. Burritt Director of Extension papers, #21-24-101. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
University extension -- New York (State) Home economics extension work -- New York (State) Agricultural extension work -- New York (State) New York State College of Agriculture
